title: The Contracts We Keep Burning
provenance: Some promises catch fire from the inside out. This is the sixth hour — when what you swore to protect becomes the thing that must transform, and you understand that keeping your word might mean letting it burn.
threshold_note: The edge where loyalty becomes fuel.
collector_meaning: You hold the moment when resolve stops being about holding on. When the truest thing you can do is let the fire have what it needs.
